title: Move OLA adapter invariants into Rust
goal: Plan and implement the adapter-language repair so route-key sanitizing, reward clamping and state normalization are covered by the tested Rust core instead of living primarily in Python scripts.

acceptance.assertion: Route-key sanitizing, reward clamping and state normalization are represented in Rust with regression coverage.
Python OLA scripts are reduced to fixture, probe or delegation roles rather than owning the transformation contract.

metadata.claude_delegation: primary architecture pass before code changes; implementation may then route through Grabowski/Codex
